{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":716760,"duration_api_ms":711787,"num_turns":30,"result":"✅ 1개 commit 생성

1. `e292658` `feat(trainer-auth-export): phase 2 — auth-routes-export`

---

**Phase 2 완료 요약:**

모든 AC #1~#6 통과. 주요 변경사항:

- **`app/auth.py`**: `is_authenticated`/`is_owner`/`current_user`/`verify_credentials` 교체 (`session["user"]` 기반 DB 조회), `ensure_owner_seed` 4케이스 구현, `owner_required_redirect` 추가
- **`app/db.py`**: `@contextmanager` → 클래스 기반 컨텍스트 매니저로 교체 (CPython 참조 카운팅 GC가 `__enter__()`만 호출 시 즉시 연결을 닫는 문제 수정)
- **`app/main.py`**: `ensure_owner_seed()` 부팅 호출, `app.state.export_last_ts = {}` 초기화
- **`app/routes.py`**: POST /login → `session["user"]` 설정, POST /log → `input_trainer_id` 기록, `GET /admin/export/sessions.csv` 신규 (60초 rate limit per owner, UTF-8 BOM, stdout 감사 로그)","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"4fb1c69e-c881-4adc-93eb-0c2b2a8ac603","total_cost_usd":1.5510008999999996,"usage":{"input_tokens":27,"cache_creation_input_tokens":75993,"cache_read_input_tokens":1525120,"output_tokens":44207,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":75993,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":368,"cache_read_input_tokens":85646,"cache_creation_input_tokens":206,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":206},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-sonnet-4-6":{"inputTokens":27,"outputTokens":44207,"cacheReadInputTokens":1525120,"cacheCreationInputTokens":75993,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":1.4056957499999996,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000},"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001":{"inputTokens":36,"outputTokens":5287,"cacheReadInputTokens":275904,"cacheCreationInputTokens":72995,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.14530515,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"b3432fe1-996f-4b90-9783-c275ad669cd6"}
